string.text: Find Level 1 Toolkit
The Stalker Technician needs a basic toolkit to upgrade his equipment. Find and bring the Level 1 Toolkit.
Locate the Level 1 Toolkit and deliver it to the Stalker Technician to improve his gear.
Level 1 Toolkit
You have successfully delivered the Level 1 Toolkit to the Stalker Technician. The upgrade is now possible.
Find Level 2 Toolkit
The Stalker Technician requires an advanced toolkit for further upgrades. Find and bring the Level 2 Toolkit.
Locate the Level 2 Toolkit and deliver it to the Stalker Technician to enhance his equipment.
Level 2 Toolkit
You have successfully delivered the Level 2 Toolkit to the Stalker Technician. Further upgrades are now available.
Find Level 3 Toolkit
The Stalker Technician needs an expert toolkit for the highest level upgrades. Find and bring the Level 3 Toolkit.
Locate the Level 3 Toolkit and deliver it to the Stalker Technician to complete the upgrade series.
Level 3 Toolkit
You have successfully delivered the Level 3 Toolkit to the Stalker Technician. The upgrades are now complete.
Find Medical Drug Kit
The Stalker Medic needs a medical drug kit for his supplies. Find and deliver it to him.
Locate a medical drug kit and bring it to the Stalker Medic to help him treat wounded stalkers.
Medical Drug Kit
You have delivered the medical drug kit to the Stalker Medic. He can now provide better care to the injured.
Find Level 1 Toolkit
The Ecologist Docent needs a basic toolkit for research purposes. Find and bring the Level 1 Toolkit.
Find the Level 1 Toolkit and deliver it to the Ecologist Docent to assist with his studies.
Level 1 Toolkit
You have delivered the Level 1 Toolkit to the Ecologist Docent. Your help is appreciated.
Find Level 2 Toolkit
The Ecologist Docent requires an advanced toolkit to continue his research. Find and bring the Level 2 Toolkit.
Locate and deliver the Level 2 Toolkit to the Ecologist Docent for his research needs.
Level 2 Toolkit
You have delivered the Level 2 Toolkit to the Ecologist Docent. Research can proceed.
Find Level 3 Toolkit
The Ecologist Docent needs an expert toolkit to finalize his experiments. Find and bring the Level 3 Toolkit.
Deliver the Level 3 Toolkit to the Ecologist Docent to complete his scientific research.
Level 3 Toolkit
You have delivered the Level 3 Toolkit to the Ecologist Docent. The research is now complete.
Find Medical Drug Kit
The Ecologist Professor needs a medical drug kit for his fieldwork. Find and deliver it to him.
Locate a medical drug kit and bring it to the Ecologist Professor to aid his medical needs.
Medical Drug Kit
You have delivered the medical drug kit to the Ecologist Professor. He can now continue his work safely.
